name: Aaron Industries Limited
summary: Aaron Industries Limited engages in manufacturing and trading of elevator products and other elevator parts for elevator industry in India. It offers various elevator products and parts, including elevators, elevator cabins, elevator doors, elevator kits, and complete kits, as well as auto door systems, door operators, swing doors, manual doors, and gearless machines. The company also provides electrical equipment and accessories, such as bus bars, MCB D.B., boxes, switch and accessories, and z perline. In addition, it engages in polishing, processing, designing, and finishing of stainless steel sheets, PVD coated colored sheets, and designer sheets for food storage, architectural and construction, appliances, and other sectors. Further, the company trades in traction machine, elevators kit parts, boom barriers, sensors, and other products. Aaron Industries Limited was founded in 2013 and is based in Surat, India.
